name: Teriyaki Lamb Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Boned leg of lamb, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the pineapple juice with soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, and garlic salt.
2. To make the kabobs, alternate layers of lamb cubes, bacon, pineapple, and dried figs on skewers.
3. Place the assembled kabobs in a shallow pan.
4. Pour the pineapple marinade over the kabobs.
5. Refrigerate for several hours to allow the flavors to develop.
6. Remove the kabobs from the marinade, reserving it for later use.
7. Broil the kabobs for about 10 minutes, brushing occasionally with the reserved sauce.
8. Turn the kabobs and broil an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve the kabobs over hot rice.
